PsySymbol
Dreams · Symbols · Numbers

Contact

We read every email. For all enquiries — feedback, factual corrections, a topic you'd like written about, or press — reach us at:

hello@psysymbol.com

What we respond to

  • Corrections. If you spot a factual error or a misrepresented tradition, please tell us — we genuinely want to know.
  • Topic requests. Repeating dream you want covered? A symbol or number we haven't written about yet? Let us know.
  • Privacy / data requests. See our privacy policy. We respond to access, deletion, and rectification requests within 30 days.
  • Press / collaborations. Brief us with a deadline and we'll get back to you.

What we don't do over email

We're not able to offer personal interpretation by email — we'd be a worse therapist than a real therapist, and a slower symbolic reader than the public pages we already publish. If you're going through something heavy, please talk to a professional. We mean this gently and seriously.

Postal address

PsySymbol is published by RM Technologies LLC. Postal correspondence is available on request via email.
